article_title: Unif. Vehicle Certificate of Title Act
text: If any provision of this article or the application thereof to any person or circumstances is held invalid, the invalidity shall not affect other provisions or applications of the article which can be given effect without the invalid provision or application, and to this end the provisions of this article are declared to be severable.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 10
#### Article 46. Unif. Vehicle Certificate of Title Act
##### § 2135 — Severability

If any provision of this article or the application thereof to any person or circumstances is held invalid, the invalidity shall not affect other provisions or applications of the article which can be given effect without the invalid provision or application, and to this end the provisions of this article are declared to be severable.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
